pi_items.source: seed_demodb.py lines 201, 209: Two profiles with Nationality='Japanese' exist - Yuki Tanaka and Kai Yamamoto
task.json description: 'Create a new class VIPProfiles that extends the existing Profiles class'

task.json description: 'Create a Manager vertex with Name=Akira Kurosawa'. Note: Akira Kurosawa (1910-1998) was a legendary Japanese film director, but this name is used as a fictional manager identifier in the task.
task.json description: 'Create a new class Managers that extends V (Vertex)'
task.json description: 'Create a new class ManagedBy that extends E (Edge)' and 'Link all VIPProfiles to this manager using the ManagedBy edge'

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on OrientDB's demodb database containing synthesized travel agency data. The database includes exactly 2 profiles with Nationality='Japanese': Yuki Tanaka (Female, born 1995-04-12) and Kai Yamamoto (Male, born 1996-08-16). The task requires creating three new schema elements: (1) VIPProfiles class extending Profiles, (2) Managers class extending Vertex, and (3) ManagedBy edge class extending Edge. These classes will be used to create a VIP tier management system with a manager named Akira Kurosawa (a name referencing the legendary Japanese film director) managing the Japanese customer profiles.
